text: USSR-UAR: Soviet officials, who apparently hoped that increased aid to the UAR to assist the complete Aswan Dam project would inhibit Cairo from further attacks on Arab Communists, are miffed by the substance of Nasir's speeches during his current tour of Syria. Deputy Foreign Minister Semenov complained to Ambassador Kuni in Moscow, that recent statements by Nasir attacking "international Communism" are unnecessary provocations. Nasir apparently has not heeded the Soviet complaint; in a speech on 23 February he lumped together "Communist agents, imperialists, and enemies of Arab nationalism
